translations.landing.pricing.faq.a1: Yes, you can Mejorar or downgrade your cloud Plan at any time. For Sin conexión licenses, you can Mejorar by paying the difference.
translations.landing.pricing.faq.a3: Yes, we offer a 30-day money-back guarantee for all paid plans. No questions asked.
translations.landing.pricing.faq.a4: Absolutely! The open Fuente core is MIT licensed. You can use it for any purpose, including commercial projects.
translations.landing.pricing.faq.a5: Yes. Flyto2 runs entirely on your computer. Your data never leaves your machine, regardless of which Plan you're on.
translations.landing.pricing.faq.a6: The Gratis Plan has generous limits that reset every month. If you reach the limit, you can wait for the Siguiente month or Mejorar to Pro for unlimited access.
translations.landing.pricing.faq.a7: No. The Gratis Plan requires no credit card, no Cuenta and no commitment. Just Descargar and Iniciar automating.
translations.landing.pricing.faq.a8: Desktop Pro runs on your computer — perfect for privacy and Sin conexión use. Cloud plans Agregar Equipo Características like shared Flujos de trabajo and collaboration.
